pageContext.name: MS-09F/Trop Dom Troopen ver. A.N.I.M.E.
pageContext.description: The heavily armored and highly maneuverable Dom Tropen mobile suits that attacked Torrington Base join ver. A.N.I.M.E.! In the storyline said to be based off of the Dom Tropical Test Type units, their hover-effect maneuvering is used to deadly effect against enemies. Deployed in tropical theaters around West Africa , they participated in the attack on Torrington Base and the defense of the Kimberlight mine.
